name: fable-advisor
description: Run your session on Claude's most capable model as a full-time architect: it writes specs and verdicts while GPT-5.6 Sol at high reasoning (via Codex) and Grok 4.5 (via the Grok CLI) do the typing — default lane configurable per user. Also ships grok-researcher (live web/X research + codebase lookups) and grok-reviewer (cold diff review lens). Fable-level judgment with cross-vendor implementation and review.
